item.title: Version 0.3.6
item.description: - Added a Dockmint-style first-run onboarding flow, including a completion screen that points new users to the menu bar icon for future settings access. - Stopped auto-opening Settings and automatic permission prompts during first-run setup, so onboarding now owns the initial experience end to end. - Simplified permission setup UI with tooltip-based explanations, direct System Settings links, updated app identities for dev and beta builds, and refreshed app icon packaging.
